workLog.action: Surveyed sibling rules issues (#1744-1754). Found sibling PR #1759 (issue #1754) open with the established .claude/rules/ pattern: frontmatter (description + alwaysApply), H1, sectioned content, accompanying session log. Reused that schema.
workLog.outcome: Established frontmatter convention and session log schema. Set alwaysApply: false for this rule (pattern is conditional/situational, applied when designing persistence or orchestration; differs from code-quality which is everyday and uses alwaysApply: true).

workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/enterprise-patterns.md with frontmatter and 9 sections: Core Vocabulary, Repository, Unit of Work, Data Mapper, Service Layer, Identity Map, Pattern Selection, Anti-Patterns, Boundaries with Existing Codebase, Quick Self-Review.
workLog.outcome: 11615 bytes single file. All five patterns from issue spec present. Pattern Selection guides composition. Anti-Patterns section captures Anemic Domain Model, Smart UI, Repository-as-DAO, ambient transactions. Boundaries section ties rule to ai-agents orchestrator (Service Layer), session management (Repository), memory systems (Repository).
